product_updates.title: AI ‘actor’ Tilly Norwood put out the worst song I’ve ever heard
product_updates.content: This song is an AI actor's rallying cry to other AI actors, urging them to keep going despite the naysayers who doubt their humanity. Literally no one can relate to this.

product_updates.title: Ford’s new AI assistant will help fleet owners know if seatbelts are being used
product_updates.content: Ford Pro AI debuted at Work Truck Week in Indianapolis and is now available to all of its U.S.-based Pro telematics subscribers.

product_updates.title: Zendesk acquires agentic customer service startup Forethought
product_updates.content: Forethought was years ahead of its time and the 2018 winner of TechCrunch Battlefield.

product_updates.title: Netflix may have paid $600 million for Ben Affleck’s AI startup
product_updates.content: This deal could rank as among the streaming giant's largest acquisitions ever.

product_updates.title: Lovable says it added $100M in revenue last month alone, with just 146 employees
product_updates.content: Swedish vibe-coding unicorn Lovable crossed $400 million in annual recurring revenue (ARR) in February.

product_updates.title: Replit snags $9B valuation 6 months after hitting $3B
product_updates.content: Replit raised a new $400 million round and said it hopes to have $1B in ARR by year's end.

product_updates.title: WordPress debuts a private workspace that runs in your browser via a new service, my.WordPress.net
product_updates.content: WordPress’s new browser-based service lets users create private sites without hosting or signing up, turning the platform into a personal workspace for writing, research, and AI tools.

product_updates.title: Rivian spin-out Mind Robotics raises $500M for industrial AI-powered robots
product_updates.content: The startup, which was created by Rivian founder RJ Scaringe, is looking to train on data from, and deploy in, Rivian's factory.

product_updates.title: Meta’s Moltbook deal points to a future built around AI agents
product_updates.content: Meta’s Moltbook acquisition may look odd at first, but the deal could signal how Meta sees AI agents shaping future advertising and commerce on an agentic web.

product_updates.title: Amazon expands a program that lets customers shop from other retailers’ sites
product_updates.content: The changes allow more merchants to participate in Amazon's Shop Direct program, which sends Amazon customers to other retailers' websites.

technical_breakthroughs.title: 14,000 routers are infected by malware that's highly resistant to takedowns
technical_breakthroughs.content: Most of the devices are made by Asus and are located in the US.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Hustlers are cashing in on China’s OpenClaw AI craze
technical_breakthroughs.content: Feng Qingyang had always hoped to launch his own company, but he never thought this would be how—or that the day would come this fast. Feng, a 27-year-old software engineer based in Beijing, started tinkering with OpenClaw, a popular new open-source AI tool that can take over a device and autonom…

technical_breakthroughs.title: The Download: Pokémon Go to train world models, and the US-China race to find aliens
technical_breakthroughs.content: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology.
